panels.title: Cluster CPU
panels.description: Current cluster CPU occupancy from PBS node capacity metrics.

panels.title: Cluster GPU
panels.description: Current cluster GPU occupancy from PBS node capacity metrics.

panels.title: Cluster Memory
panels.description: Current cluster memory occupancy from PBS node capacity metrics.

panels.title: Running Jobs
panels.description: Running jobs matching the selected owner, queue, and project filters.

panels.title: Queued Jobs
panels.description: Queued jobs matching the selected owner, queue, and project filters.

panels.title: Requested CPU
panels.description: Total CPU cores requested by the selected jobs.

panels.title: Requested Memory
panels.description: Total memory requested by the selected jobs.

panels.title: Wait p95
panels.description: Current p95 queue wait from snapshot queue buckets. This is a snapshot, not a rate.

panels.title: Cluster Occupancy Trend
panels.description: CPU, GPU, and memory occupancy over the selected time range.

panels.title: Selected Jobs by State
panels.description: Current selected job population split by PBS state.

panels.title: Requested vs Used Resources
panels.description: Selected jobs: total requested resources compared with current usage reported by PBS.

panels.title: CPU Request Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested CPU cores.

panels.title: GPU Request Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested GPU devices.

panels.title: Memory Request Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested memory size.

panels.title: Walltime Request Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested walltime.

panels.title: Node Request Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested number of nodes.

panels.title: MPI Process Distribution
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by requested MPI process count.

panels.title: CPU Usage Ratio
panels.description: Average used/requested CPU ratio for selected jobs with usage data.

panels.title: Walltime Ratio
panels.description: Average used/requested walltime ratio for selected jobs with usage data.

panels.title: Memory Usage Ratio
panels.description: Average used/requested memory ratio for selected jobs with usage data.

panels.title: Avg Queue Wait
panels.description: Average queue wait for selected queued jobs.

panels.title: Max Runtime
panels.description: Longest runtime among selected running jobs.

panels.title: Max Wait
panels.description: Longest wait among selected queued jobs.

panels.title: CPU Requested vs Used
panels.description: Total requested CPU cores compared to used CPU cores for selected jobs.

panels.title: Walltime Requested vs Used
panels.description: Total requested walltime compared to walltime already consumed by selected jobs.

panels.title: Memory Requested vs Used
panels.description: Total requested memory compared to currently used memory for selected jobs.

panels.title: Top Unused CPU Reservations
panels.description: Jobs with the largest difference between requested CPU cores and real CPU usage derived from resources_used.cpupercent / 100.

panels.title: Top Walltime Headroom
panels.description: Jobs with the largest remaining requested walltime based on current usage.

panels.title: Top Memory Headroom
panels.description: Jobs with the largest difference between requested and used memory.

panels.title: Jobs by Owner
panels.description: Top owners by selected job count. Default filter shows all owners; choose one owner to focus.

panels.title: Requested CPU by Owner
panels.description: Top owners by requested CPU cores in the selected job set.

panels.title: Requested Memory by Owner
panels.description: Top owners by requested memory in the selected job set.

panels.title: Owner Job State Trend
panels.description: Selected jobs over time grouped by owner and PBS state.

panels.title: Queue Wait by Owner
panels.description: Owners with the highest average queue wait among selected queued jobs.

panels.title: CPU Efficiency by Owner
panels.description: Average used/requested CPU ratio by owner for selected jobs with usage data.

panels.title: Jobs by Queue
panels.description: Selected jobs grouped by queue to show where the filtered workload sits.

panels.title: Requested CPU by Queue
panels.description: Top queues by total requested CPU cores for selected jobs.

panels.title: Requested Memory by Project
panels.description: Top projects by total requested memory for selected jobs.

panels.title: Queue Wait Trend
panels.description: Queue wait p50, p95, and oldest queued job for selected queues. Bucket metrics are snapshots.

panels.title: Backlog Past SLA
panels.description: Queued jobs waiting longer than 1, 2, and 5 days across selected queues.

panels.title: Project Job Mix
panels.description: Top projects by selected job count.

panels.title: Top Jobs by Requested CPU
panels.description: Highest CPU requests in the selected job set, with labels for owner, queue, project, and state.

panels.title: Top Jobs by Requested Memory
panels.description: Highest memory requests in the selected job set.

panels.title: Top Jobs by Requested Walltime
panels.description: Longest requested walltimes in the selected job set.

panels.title: Top Running Jobs by CPU Percent
panels.description: Running jobs with the highest PBS-reported CPU percent.

panels.title: Top Running Jobs by Used Memory
panels.description: Running jobs with the highest current memory usage.

panels.title: Longest Queued Jobs
panels.description: Queued jobs with the longest current wait time.

panels.title: Inspection Up
panels.description: Whether the job inspection collector is currently reporting successful data.

panels.title: Inspection Errors
panels.description: Total job inspection collection errors since exporter start.

panels.title: Last Success Age
panels.description: Seconds since the last successful job inspection collection.

panels.title: Inspected Jobs
panels.description: Number of job inspection series currently visible after filters.

panels.title: Running With Usage
panels.description: Selected jobs that have current usage metrics populated.

panels.title: Queued With Wait
panels.description: Selected queued jobs that have queue wait seconds populated.

panels.title: Inspection Health Trend
panels.description: Job inspection status and time since last successful collection.

panels.title: Inspection Errors Trend
panels.description: Job inspection errors over time. Any increase should be investigated.
